psm_att.estimand: ATT of first-day face-to-face follow-up on lead conversion
psm_att.method: 1:1 nearest-neighbor PSM without replacement; 0.2 SD logit caliper; exact city and month; 1,000 paired bootstraps
assumptions: No unmeasured confounding after adjustment for observed baseline covariates.
The first valid follow-up occurred before ordering; order timestamps are unavailable, so this cannot be verified.
Treatment is the only method recorded on the first valid follow-up date; ambiguous same-day methods are excluded.
Exact matching is enforced within city and lead month.

aipw_att.method: AIPW ATT with logistic propensity and treatment-aware logistic outcome model
assumptions: No unmeasured confounding after adjustment for observed baseline covariates.
The first valid follow-up occurred before ordering; order timestamps are unavailable, so this cannot be verified.
Treatment is the only method recorded on the first valid follow-up date; ambiguous same-day methods are excluded.
Exact matching is enforced within city and lead month.

delivery_score_raw_difference.estimand: Mean delivery-score difference: delayed minus on-time
assumptions: Only orders without conflicts in delivery date, configuration, mileage, delay flag, and score are included.
City, configuration, and delivery month are adjusted; unmeasured delivery complexity may remain.
Promised and actual delivery dates are unavailable, so delay severity and an assignment threshold cannot be reconstructed.

delivery_score_adjusted_association.method: OLS with HC3 robust SE; controls: city, configuration, delivery month
assumptions: Only orders without conflicts in delivery date, configuration, mileage, delay flag, and score are included.
City, configuration, and delivery month are adjusted; unmeasured delivery complexity may remain.
Promised and actual delivery dates are unavailable, so delay severity and an assignment threshold cannot be reconstructed.

complaint_adjusted_association.method: Linear probability model with HC3 robust SE; controls: city, configuration, delivery month
assumptions: Only orders without conflicts in delivery date, configuration, mileage, delay flag, and score are included.
City, configuration, and delivery month are adjusted; unmeasured delivery complexity may remain.
Promised and actual delivery dates are unavailable, so delay severity and an assignment threshold cannot be reconstructed.

rdd_feasibility.method: Design audit: no continuous assignment variable with a known operational cutoff
assumptions: Only orders without conflicts in delivery date, configuration, mileage, delay flag, and score are included.
City, configuration, and delivery month are adjusted; unmeasured delivery complexity may remain.
Promised and actual delivery dates are unavailable, so delay severity and an assignment threshold cannot be reconstructed.

channel_attribution_scope.estimand: Adjusted marginal conversion probability by single acquisition channel
channel_attribution_scope.method: Descriptive Wilson intervals and logistic standardization; not multi-touch Shapley attribution
assumptions: Each lead has one acquisition channel.
No channel-level spend or multi-touch path is available.
Standardized differences are predictive/associational, not causal.
Only fields available at lead creation are used.
Performance is predictive and does not imply causal feature effects.

model.survival_analysis_status: removed: no valid event-time definition is available

interpretation_rules.significance: A result is not described as reliable positive evidence unless its 95% CI excludes zero and design diagnostics pass.
interpretation_rules.causal_language: Adjusted associations and predictive explanations are not described as causal effects.
interpretation_rules.multiple_testing: Exploratory subgroup comparisons require Benjamini-Hochberg FDR control before promotion to findings.
